Enum Class AgiStatus

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<AgiStatus>
uno.anahata.asi.agi.status.AgiStatus
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<AgiStatus>, Constable
public enum AgiStatus extends Enum<AgiStatus>
Defines the possible operational states of the Agi, primarily for UI feedback. This is a direct port of the proven V1 enum.
Author:
anahata

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    API_CALL_IN_PROGRESS
    A normal API call is in progress (e.g., waiting for a model response).
    AUTO_EXECUTING_TOOLS
    Local tools are being automatically executed as part of the agi loop.
    AWAKENING_KUNDALINI
    The assistant is assembling context and preparing the API connection.
    CANDIDATE_CHOICE_PROMPT
    The model has returned multiple candidates and is waiting for the user to choose one.
    ERROR
    A non-retryable API error occurred, or max retries were reached.
    IDLE
    The model has finished processing and is waiting for the user's next input.
    MAX_RETRIES_REACHED
    The assistant has hit the maximum number of retries and has stopped.
    SHUTDOWN
    The agi session has been shut down.
    TOOL_EXECUTION_ERROR
    An error occurred during local tool execution.
    TOOL_PROMPT
    The assistant is waiting for the user to approve/deny tool calls.
    WAITING_WITH_BACKOFF
    An API error occurred, and the system is in retry mode with exponential backoff.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final boolean
    active
    Indicates if the agi is currently in an active state (e.g., processing, waiting for API, executing tools).
    private final String
    description
    A detailed, technical description of the status and its implications.
    private final String
    displayName
    The user-friendly, descriptive label for the status.

  • Enum Constant Details

    • IDLE

      public static final AgiStatus IDLE
      The model has finished processing and is waiting for the user's next input.

    • AWAKENING_KUNDALINI

      public static final AgiStatus AWAKENING_KUNDALINI
      The assistant is assembling context and preparing the API connection.

    • API_CALL_IN_PROGRESS

      public static final AgiStatus API_CALL_IN_PROGRESS
      A normal API call is in progress (e.g., waiting for a model response).

    • TOOL_PROMPT

      public static final AgiStatus TOOL_PROMPT
      The assistant is waiting for the user to approve/deny tool calls.

    • CANDIDATE_CHOICE_PROMPT

      public static final AgiStatus CANDIDATE_CHOICE_PROMPT
      The model has returned multiple candidates and is waiting for the user to choose one.

    • AUTO_EXECUTING_TOOLS

      public static final AgiStatus AUTO_EXECUTING_TOOLS
      Local tools are being automatically executed as part of the agi loop.

    • TOOL_EXECUTION_ERROR

      public static final AgiStatus TOOL_EXECUTION_ERROR
      An error occurred during local tool execution.

    • WAITING_WITH_BACKOFF

      public static final AgiStatus WAITING_WITH_BACKOFF
      An API error occurred, and the system is in retry mode with exponential backoff.

    • MAX_RETRIES_REACHED

      public static final AgiStatus MAX_RETRIES_REACHED
      The assistant has hit the maximum number of retries and has stopped.

    • ERROR

      public static final AgiStatus ERROR
      A non-retryable API error occurred, or max retries were reached.

    • SHUTDOWN

      public static final AgiStatus SHUTDOWN
      The agi session has been shut down.

  • Field Details

    • displayName

      private final String displayName
      The user-friendly, descriptive label for the status.

    • description

      private final String description
      A detailed, technical description of the status and its implications.

    • active

      private final boolean active
      Indicates if the agi is currently in an active state (e.g., processing, waiting for API, executing tools). Non-active states include IDLE, ERROR, and SHUTDOWN.

      private AgiStatus()

    • values

      public static AgiStatus[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static AgiStatus valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null
